title: gamochaeta filaginea
intro: Gamochaeta filaginea, also known as woolly cup grass or woolly ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Gamochaeta filaginea has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever reduction, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, offering potential health benefits like reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Gamochaeta filaginea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin.
